A.text: Two pentagons share a common edge.

B.text: Each hexagon is adjacent only to pentagons.

C.text: Each pentagon is adjacent only to hexagons.

D.text: No two hexagons share a common edge.

parsed.answer_value: Each pentagon is adjacent only to hexagons.
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows a pattern where each pentagon is surrounded by hexagons, and no pentagon is adjacent to another pentagon. This indicates that each pentagon is only connected to hexagons.
